name: Periodo de Recuperación
description: Calcula el tiempo para recuperar una inversión.
seo_description: Calcula el tiempo para recuperar una inversión. Calculadora gratuita, precisa e instantánea. Con desglose de zonas de entrenamiento.
example_label: Calculating payback period for $75,000 investment generating $18,500 annual cash flow.
result_context: The payback of {payback} years shows how long until the initial investment is recovered.
formula_display: Payback Period = Initial Investment ÷ Annual Cash Flow

steps.description: Divide investment by annual cash flow

steps.calculation: Investment recovers in approximately 4 years and 2 weeks

mistakes: Not considering time value of money (use discounted payback instead)
Ignoring cash flows that occur after payback period
Using accounting profit instead of actual cash flows
